candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: 10.0 g each of three different gases are present in three glass containers of identical volume, as shown below. The temperature of all three flasks is held constant at 298 K. Which of the gases would have the greatest density?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: All three gases would have the same density.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
10.0 g 混合气体中包含三种不同的气体,分别为二氧化硫($\mathrm{SO_2}$)、甲烷($\mathrm{CH_4}$)和三氯化氮($\mathrm{NCl_3}$)。所有三个气体在298 K恒温条件下,哪种气体的密度最大?

A. $\mathrm{SO_2}$
B. $\mathrm{CH_4}$
C. $\mathrm{NCl_3}$
D. 三种气体的密度相同
metadata.explanation_zh: 密度被定义为物质的质量与单位体积之比。根据题意,每种气体的质量和体积都是相同的。由于密度与质量成正比,与体积成反比,因此如果两种物质的质量和体积都相等,它们的密度也必然相等。因此,给出的解释在逻辑上是正确的,无需改进。
